etymology.description: зөІ(зё·) (sД«, "silk thread") + иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, "speech") = combination of silk and speech elements
etymology.interpretation: The character дңҢ combines зөІ(зіё) (sД«, "silk thread") and иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, "speech") to suggest the idea of language or speech components being woven together. This illustrates its role as a phonetic component, symbolically suggesting the intricate nature of speech or narration.
